message:
feat(mux-pool): add structured diagnostics for pool state transitions (ft-2h5wv)

Adds structured tracing to MuxPool covering all state transitions
required by the acceptance criteria: acquire (idle reuse vs new
connection), release, connection failure, health check (pass/fail
with counters), idle eviction, and pool clear.

All 63 mux_pool tests pass with vendored feature enabled.
Core Cx-threaded asupersync migration was completed by prior agents;
this commit adds the diagnostic observability layer and validates
the full test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
